# Studio1

> Technical content and DevRel partner for devtool and SaaS teams.

Studio1 helps developer-focused companies publish tutorials, documentation, and DevRel programs that rank in search, activate developers, and build long-term trust. We have worked with 40+ companies including Amazon, Nebius AI, Bright Data, Permit.io, CopilotKit, LambdaTest, LiteLLM, and Stream.

## Services

- [Blog as a Service](https://studio1hq.com/blog-as-service): Developer tutorials, guides, and technical blog posts written by engineers.
- [DevRel as a Service](https://studio1hq.com/devrel-as-service): End-to-end developer relations programs -- strategy, content, community, and events.
- [Audit Services](https://studio1hq.com/audit-services): Developer experience and documentation audits.
- [Tech Video Production](https://studio1hq.com/video-production): Technical video content for developer audiences.
- [Product Launch Support](https://studio1hq.com/product-launch): Launch campaigns targeting developer communities.
- [Organic Campaign](https://studio1hq.com/organic-campaign): SEO and organic growth campaigns for developer products.
- [Influencer Management](https://studio1hq.com/influencer-management): Developer influencer outreach and management.

## Team

- **Arindam Majumder** -- Co-founder & Content Lead. Developer advocate, open-source contributor, and technical writer who has reached 270k+ developers.
- **Amitesh Anand** -- Co-founder & Operations Lead. Technical writer and developer advocate with 80k+ published words across major tech platforms.
- **Shivay Lamba** -- ML Engineer and open-source advocate.
